stories.title: Spotify expands its AI push with a ChatGPT-like music assistant
stories.simple_summary: Spotify is adding a chatbot feature to its app where you can talk to AI to get music and podcast recommendations, similar to how you'd ask a friend for suggestions.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Spotify, you'll have a new way to discover music without scrolling through lists — but it's just a convenience feature, not something you need to worry about.

stories.title: Sam Altman didn’t need another lawsuit
stories.simple_summary: Apple is suing OpenAI, the company behind ChatGPT, over some kind of legal dispute involving hardware that OpenAI invested in.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly a story for investors and tech industry watchers — it doesn't affect your daily use of AI tools.

stories.title: Google’s Demis Hassabis says it’s time for a global AI watchdog — led by the US
stories.simple_summary: A Google executive is saying the world needs a government agency to watch over AI and make sure it stays safe, and that the US should run it.
stories.why_it_matters: This is about big-picture policy — it doesn't change anything you do today, but it's an idea about how AI might be governed in the future.

stories.title: New York becomes the first state to enact a data center moratorium
stories.simple_summary: New York state has blocked new large computer data centers (the buildings that power AI and other internet services) from being built there for up to a year.
stories.why_it_matters: This could slightly slow down AI companies' growth in New York, but for most people and small businesses this is just a political decision with limited direct impact.

stories.title: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
stories.simple_summary: Wealthy tech companies and founders who've already made a lot of money are jumping back into business to compete in AI, worried they'll miss out.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly about what's happening inside the tech industry — nothing you need to act on personally.

stories.title: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want to be ‘everything for everyone’
stories.simple_summary: Uber is exploring new services like hotels and self-driving cars, and using AI to improve how riders and drivers experience the app.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Uber, the app may get smarter and offer you more options over time, but no immediate changes for you right now.

stories.title: Video-generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
stories.simple_summary: A startup company that makes videos using AI just raised a huge amount of money and is now worth over $2 billion.
stories.why_it_matters: This is an investor story — it shows money is flowing into video AI, but it doesn't affect you unless you work in that industry.

stories.title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
stories.simple_summary: A smaller AI company is raising about $75 million from investors at a $1.5 billion valuation.
stories.why_it_matters: This is purely an investor story — nothing relevant to regular people or small business owners.

stories.title: Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
stories.simple_summary: Microsoft's leader is warning companies to be careful about relying too heavily on AI from big companies, suggesting it could be a hidden risk.
stories.why_it_matters: If your business uses AI tools from big companies, this is a reminder to think about whether you're becoming too dependent on them — good advice to keep in mind.

stories.title: Siri AI is already changing how I use my iPhone
stories.simple_summary: Apple's new iPhone software update includes AI features for Siri (the voice assistant) that make it more helpful and natural to use.
stories.why_it_matters: If you have an iPhone, you'll eventually get updates that make Siri smarter and more useful — this is a normal improvement to your device.

stories.title: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
stories.simple_summary: Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI includes some unusual claims, like OpenAI employees joking about accessing Apple's systems without permission and asking job candidates to bring Apple computers to interviews.
stories.why_it_matters: This is the legal details of the lawsuit between two tech giants — just interesting news, nothing that affects you.

stories.title: Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
stories.simple_summary: Sam Altman from OpenAI responded to Elon Musk by criticizing Musk's claims about space-based data centers, saying Musk is misleading investors.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a public argument between tech executives — interesting gossip, but nothing that impacts ordinary people or businesses.
